use_cases: Display user profile images in community support sections with hover tooltips
Show team member avatars in about or contact pages
Render user avatars in comment sections or discussion threads
Display contributor or support staff avatars in help center layouts
Show profile thumbnails in member directories or listings
ai_summary: A flexible Avatar component built with Radix UI primitives and class-variance-authority for type-safe size variants (xs through 2xl). Features optional tooltip integration for displaying additional user information on hover. Designed as a reusable atomic component suitable for community platforms, support interfaces, and any application requiring user profile imagery with consistent styling and accessibility support.
